description_long: This is a medium-sized rectangular cardboard parcel, sealed with a strip of tan packing tape running along the top seam. The box features standard shipping and handling symbols, including a black upward arrow and a fragile glass icon on one side, and a barcode with a bold arrow on another. The cardboard surface has a slightly mottled, matte brown texture, typical of corrugated packaging. The edges are crisp and the box appears undamaged, suggesting it is new or recently packed. The overall appearance is utilitarian, designed for safe transport and easy identification in urban logistics environments. The box is likely hollow and filled with air or contents, as is standard for shipping parcels.
description: A medium brown cardboard shipping box with packing tape, handling symbols, and a barcode. The surface is matte and slightly textured, typical of corrugated packaging.
description_view_0: The front shows a plain brown surface with an upward arrow and a fragile glass symbol in black.
description_view_1: This side displays a large black arrow pointing diagonally and a barcode on the lower right, with the tape seam visible on top.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side has the upward arrow and fragile symbol, but the symbols are mirrored and the tape seam is visible.
description_view_3: This view features only the upward arrow and a barcode on the right, with the tape seam running along the top.
